allow: PowerShell(git ls-files pluplu-land | ForEach-Object { $_ }; Write-Host '=== diff 比較 ==='; $inner = git ls-files pluplu-land; foreach \($f in $inner\) { $rel = $f.Substring\('pluplu-land/'.Length\); if \(Test-Path $rel\) { $h1 = git hash-object $f; $h2 = git hash-object $rel; if \($h1 -ne $h2\) { Write-Host "DIFFERENT: $rel" } } else { Write-Host "ONLY-IN-NESTED: $rel" } })
